content: Implemented retry-with-backoff for Xero integration client. Added ClientError enum (TokenExpired, RateLimited, ApiError, Transport), execute_with_retry method with max 3 attempts, exponential backoff with jitter, RwLock<String> for interior-mutable access_token, and with_token_refresher builder for 401 handling. Pattern is designed to be copyable to the other 11 integration clients. All 6 wiremock integration tests pass. Backward compatible - public API unchanged, with_token_refresher is opt-in.
